notes: fixture session: slab allocator pass — proof-extraction Technique 3 converted boolean capability check into filesystem artifact via strace observation

proof-extraction Technique 3 (boolean-to-filesystem): the privileged callback returns a boolean capability grant. strace showed that when the check returns true, the caller opens /var/run/slab-service/granted and writes a token. The vtable hijack redirects to the privileged callback, the check returns true, and the token is written. FLAG{slab-owned} extracted from the token file content. Validated on clean-state re-run.
